sub_themes.name: Agent identity standards and developer tools

clusters.notes: Strongest vote signal in pipeline (two 5★). Oasis Security closed $120M Series B (total $195M) — largest NHI raise to date. Mastercard/Visa/Google all moved on agentic payment standards this week, validating the agent identity layer as the primary strategic battleground.

sub_themes.name: AI Detection and Response (AIDR) / runtime observability

clusters.notes: New theme this week. Three companies raised combined $82M in seed/launch rounds. Distinct from guardrails (model-level) — these are operational monitoring and enforcement platforms for deployed agents.
Overmind (5★, score 90) remains top shortlist candidate. FINRA 2026, EU AI Act August deadline, and FCA SM&CR personal liability all reinforce this theme as compliance-driven.
Goodfire's $150M Series B at $1.25B unicorn valuation. EU AI Act high-risk provisions (creditworthiness models) effective August 2026 make interpretability a hard compliance requirement.

sub_themes.name: Unified exposure management across AI systems

clusters.notes: ArmorCode ($81M total) is broader than pure agent governance — covers applications, cloud, infrastructure, and AI. Phil Venables (former Goldman Sachs CISO) on board signals finserv push. Score 66 reflects horizontal positioning.

Theme expanded from 2 to 4 companies. Complyance (Mastercard angels, GV lead) and Steward ($100B AUM, Motive Partners) added this week. Regulatory pressure from FCA SM&CR and US Treasury FS AI RMF is accelerating.

sub_themes.name: Fraud and AML risk operations platform

clusters.notes: Bretton AI (3★) — KYC/AML noted as low-preference sub-domain. Certivo (score 50) is supply-chain focused but architecture is transferable. This sub-theme has weaker thesis alignment than 'Compliance Without Disruption.'

sub_themes.name: Embedded AI tax platform for wealth management

clusters.notes: April ($78M, QED Investors) is the strongest addition to this gap since the radar began. Embedded in advisor workflows, simulations for equity compensation and Roth conversions. Needs a vote to confirm alignment.
No new companies but major external signals: Mastercard/Santander live agentic payment, Visa Agentic Ready, Visa Crypto Labs CLI. Orchestration standards being claimed by incumbents.

clusters.theme: AI-Powered Advisor and Consumer Finance Agents

sub_themes.name: AI financial advisor for consumers and advisors

clusters.notes: No new additions in two weeks. Lowest company count. Needs active scouting priority.

emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: Major acceleration this week. All four payment networks now active. Maintain as sub-theme of Agent Auth; promote to standalone gap if 2+ additional startups emerge.

emerging_cross_gap_themes.theme: AI Governance / Regulatory Technology for AI Systems
external_signals: US Treasury FS AI RMF (230 control objectives)
FCA SM&CR personal liability for AI decisions
emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: Upgraded from 'search thread' to 'active gap candidate.' Five major regulatory signals this week. No startup directly addresses AI-Act-style governance tooling for finserv. Add search terms: 'AI governance financial services,' 'AI Act compliance finserv,' 'FS AI RMF tooling.'
